sprints.title: Foundation — SSE endpoint, SSE hook, SVG assets

tasks.title: SSE schema & endpoint
acceptance_criteria: SearchStageEvent Pydantic model defined in schemas.py
GET /search/stream route added with sse-starlette EventSourceResponse
Same auth/preset validation as existing GET /search

tasks.title: motion dependency + SSE utils/hook
acceptance_criteria: fetchSSE helper using apiClient baseURL + getAccessToken
useSearchStream hook with useReducer + useMemoizedFn + useLatest + useUnmount

tasks.title: SVG placeholder characters (5 animals)
acceptance_criteria: Quokka SVG component (teacher, with chalk prop)
All components accept className and style props for motion integration
Placeholder quality — recognizable silhouettes, replaceable later

tasks.title: search_resources_stream() async generator
acceptance_criteria: Cache hit yields single complete event with cached=true

tasks.title: ClassroomScene component
acceptance_criteria: chalkboard.tsx: chalkboard background + stage text display
quokka-teacher.tsx: spring-based position animation, direction flip, chalk writing state
student-agent.tsx: idle/working/done state animations with motion
Cache hit animation (all students done simultaneously)
Responsive via SVG viewBox ratio preservation

tasks.title: SearchPageClient SSE integration
acceptance_criteria: useSearchStream replaces isFetching flow for primary search
EvaluationProgress retained for fallback loading UI
Search results rendered from stream.result or fallbackResults

tasks.title: i18n keys (5 languages)
acceptance_criteria: All keys in en.arb, ko.arb, zh.arb, th.arb, vi.arb

tasks.title: Integration tests
acceptance_criteria: SSE endpoint returns valid event-stream with correct stage sequence
Frontend hook receives all stage events in order
REST fallback activates on SSE failure
Cache hit returns single complete event
